problem: How are trauma and stress responses inherited epigenetically across generations?
mechanism: Microbiome modulation via targeted bacteriophage therapy
hypothesis: How are trauma and stress responses inherited epigenetically across generations? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Microbiome. Microbiome modulation via targeted bacteriophage therapy directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Mouse model knockout study with 30 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
